items.title: Lamarina, The Cove & Cucina: 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum Social Events
items.description: CorpGov, IPO Edge and PE Edge are pleased to share photographs of the social events tied to the 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum on Wednesday, Nov. 5-6. Our array of speakers from the worlds of corporate governance, activism, IPOs, private equity and venture capital enjoyed a VIP dinner at Lamarina Restaurant the night of Nov. 4. Networking cocktails […] The post Lamarina, The Cove & Cucina: 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum Social Events appeared first on CorpGov.

items.title: Shares of broader financial services stocks are trading higher amid a broader market rebound after Senate leaders approved a deal clearing the path to end the US government shutdown.
Schwab to Buy Forge Global to Boost Private Markets Offering, Stock Up
items.description: SCHW's $660M Forge Global buyout accelerates its private markets strategy amid rising investor demand for pre-IPO access, with shares up 1.7%.

items.title: GPIX: Below Average Yield, Above Average S&P 500 Exposure - I'm Avoiding It
items.description: For income-oriented investors, who are not very bullish on SPY, GPIX might not be the best choice.
